[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110000 2
1 0111110 5
2 1110111 6
3 0101101 4
4 0111111 6
5 0011101 4
6 1100001 3
7 0001111 4

01 10 0011001 3
12 21 1100001 3 match 6
23 32 1101111 6
34 43 1011111 6
45 54 1110001 4
56 65 0110111 5
67 76 0111110 5 match 1
70 07 0011101 4 match 5

02 20 1111001 5
13 31 0001111 4 match 7
24 42 1110001 4
35 53 0111111 6 match 4
46 64 1110111 6 match 2
57 75 0111101 5
60 06 0111111 6 match 4
71 17 0011101 4 match 5

03 30 0011111 5
14 41 1010001 3
25 52 1110001 4
36 63 0101111 5
47 74 1011101 5
50 05 0111001 4
61 16 0100111 4
72 27 1111101 6

15 51 0110001 3
26 62 1100111 5
37 73 0011111 5
